controls.name: Policies for Information Security
controls.description: Information security policies are defined, approved, communicated, and reviewed.

controls.name: Inventory of Information and Other Associated Assets
controls.description: Information and associated assets are identified and inventoried.

controls.name: Access Control
controls.description: Rules to control physical and logical access are established.

controls.name: Information Security Incident Management Planning
controls.description: Incident management responsibilities and procedures are planned.

controls.name: Management of Technical Vulnerabilities
controls.description: Technical vulnerabilities are identified, evaluated, and remediated.
